variants.title: Donaldson P521686 Air Primary, Wrap
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P521686 Air Primary, Wrap is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Air Primary, Wrap, Outer Diameter: 569.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 556.3 mm, Length: 608.8 mm
